ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model type */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used by the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the latest version of the model */,
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the readme file for the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_model_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("model_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_readme_id FOREIGN KEY ("readme_id") REFERENCES readme_files ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_model_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_type_id") REFERENCES model_types ("model_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the dataset (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the dataset file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset file in MB */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "e_cpv_error" REAL /* E-CPV error metric */,
  "e_cpv_uncertainty" REAL /* E-CPV uncertainty metric */,
  "e_mha_error" REAL /* E-MHA error metric */,
  "e_mha_uncertainty" REAL /* E-MHA uncertainty metric */,
  "s_mha_error" REAL /* S-MHA error metric */,
  "s_mha_uncertainty" REAL /* S-MHA uncertainty metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evaluation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evaluation was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the evaluation (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation (e.g., cross-validation, holdout) */,
  "evaluation_config" TEXT /* Configuration details for the evaluation (e.g., parameters, settings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validation_folds" (
  "validation_fold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation fold */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation the validation fold belongs to */,
  "validation_fold_name" TEXT /* Name of the validation fold */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the validation fold */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the validation fold was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the validation fold was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the validation fold (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "fold_number" INTEGER /* Number of the validation fold in the sequence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_fold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_folds_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_types" (
  "model_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model type */,
  "model_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the model type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the readme file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the readme file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model or dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model or dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "evaluation_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation metric */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evaluation metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evaluation metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_datasets" (
  "model_dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model-dataset relationship */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model-dataset relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model-dataset relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_datasets_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_datasets_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validation_results" (
  "validation_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation result */,
  "validation_fold_id" INTEGER /* ID of the validation fold */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Validation result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the validation result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the validation result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_results_validation_fold_id FOREIGN KEY ("validation_fold_id") REFERENCES validation_folds ("validation_fold_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validation_metrics" (
  "validation_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation metric */,
  "validation_result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the validation result */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the validation metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the validation metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_metrics_validation_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("validation_result_id") REFERENCES validation_results ("validation_result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
